$comment: v4 — adds tool (B2+ gather-gate tier; inert until the M3 node-gating pass reads it)

slot.description: if set, the item is equippable into this doll slot

remnantOf.description: remnants only: the god this fragment belongs to — consuming it dims THEM, world-wide

godAffinity.description: god-* id; rank-2+ attunement to wield

history.description: every legend is named and has a paragraph of history

relic.description: quest-won singulars displayable in a god's Altar relic slots (the Sanctum, WORLD-SPEC)

points.description: fixed Splendor chunk contributed while displayed

gather.description: this item scatters as a workable node: cut/mined hit by hit (players [E], villagers by the day) until its hits are spent

tool.description: B2+ node-gating tier (CRAFT-AND-BUILD-SPEC Part 1 Law 2: one tool per tier, best-in-pack). Not read by any gameplay system yet — inert until the M3 tool-tier gate lands on world nodes.
